questions.question:
다음 밑줄 친 단어의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것은?
I heard this movie is boring, so I don’t want to watch it.
다음 중 두 단어의 의미 관계가 나머지 셋과 다른 것은?

다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
This 	one of my favorite songs.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Excuse me, how 	is this book?
B : It’s only five dollars.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Can you please 	the dishes?
B : I’m sorry, but I don’t have time. I’ll do it later.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : I like this jacket very much.
B : Why do you like it?
A : 	.
choices: ④ I am reading a magazine

questions.question:
다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
◦ You can’t 	your car here.
◦ Let’s go to the 	for a picnic.
다음은 Alice의 주간계획표이다. 목요일에 할 일은?

그림으로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What is the boy doing?
B : He is 	the violin.
다음 대화가 끝난 후 두 사람이 만날 장소는?

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Mom, can I go to the movies?
B : Who are you going to go with?
A : 	.
choices: ② I’m going to go with Sora
③ We’re going to see The Planet
④ We’ll meet in front of the theater

questions.question:
다음 대화의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Which season do you like?
B : I like summer because I can go to the beach.
A : I love skiing, so I like winter.
다음 홍보문을 보고 알 수 없는 것은?

다음 방송의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Good afternoon. Welcome to the downtown library.
We have a special event today. Julia Smith will talk
about her new book, Harry Botter, in the main hall at
2 p.m. If you’re a fan, please don’t miss this event!

다음 대화에서 B가 긴장한 이유는?
A : Hi, Judy. You look worried. What’s wrong?
B : I have to give a speech in English. I’m so nervous.
A : Don’t worry. You’ll do a good job.

seahorse에 관한 다음 글의 내용과 일치하지 않는 것은?
The seahorse is very interesting in many ways. It is
a kind of fish, but it looks like a horse. It swims
standing up. It moves slowly in the water. When it is
in danger, it can change its color.

주어진 말에 이어질 두 사람의 대화를 <보기>에서 찾아
순서대로 가장 적절하게 배열한 것은?
Seho, where are you going?
<보기>
(A) To the library. I need to return these books.
(B) Yes, please. Thank you!
(C) They look heavy. Do you need any help?

다음 글에서 Minsu가 버스에서 내린 이유로 가장 적절한 것은?
Yesterday, Minsu got on a bus. He put his card on
the reader to pay the fare. But the machine said that
there was not enough money on his card. So he had
to get off the bus. He was embarrassed.

그래프로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
More than 50% of the students chose 	as
the main cause of their stress.

Franz Liszt에 관한 다음 글에서 언급된 내용이 아닌 것은?
Have you heard of Franz Liszt? He was born in
Hungary in 1811. His father played the cello, so Liszt
became interested in music. Liszt first started playing
the 	piano 	when 	he 	was 	seven. 	He 	later 	became 	a
great pianist, composer, and teacher.

다음 밑줄 친 they가 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
The Sahara Desert is a very hot place. It is difficult
for animals to survive there, but ants can live in this
environment. 	How 	can 	they 	do 	that? 	Because 	their
bodies can reflect the heat from the sun.

수영장에서 지켜야 할 규칙으로 언급되지 않은 것은?
◦ Do not run.
◦ Do not eat food.
◦ Do not dive into the pool.

다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
There are many good things about using a smartphone. First, I can get in touch with my friends anywhere. Also, I can easily get the information I need. This is useful when I have a lot of homework to do.

다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Hello, Dr. Brown. I have a problem. I keep buying
things 	that 	I 	don’t 	need. 	So 	I 	have 	a 	lot 	of
unnecessary things. I really want to break this bad
habit. What should I do?

다음 글의 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Why do people dance? They dance to express feelings, give happiness to others, or enjoy themselves. Now, let’s take a look at different kinds of dance around the world.
choices: ④ 책을 많이 읽어야 하는 이유
